# Settings\n- __Redesigned the colour selector page from the ground up__\n    - Automatically generated, built on the latest designs, etc.\n- Seasonal colours are now displayed in a dropdown when applicable\n- The 'create a colour' modal has been replaced\n\n![colours!!](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/colours.png)\n\n# Tracks\n- __Now playing tracks are coloured based on album art by default__\n- __Fixed HTML tags displaying in tracklists__\n\n![haiii](https://katelyynn.github.io/bleh/fm/changelog/img/sanitise.png)\n\n# UI\n- __Animations have been completely re-thought out__\n    - Mostly quick fades to make the world of bleh:tm: feel more responsive.\n- Cards, menus, and modals now have borders in all themes again\n- Menus are now more rounded to fit menu items\n- 'Special' (coloured) menu items now have more opaque hover backgrounds\n- Standardised spacing in menus\n- Tooltips now use their own background layer\n- Greatly increased shadows behinds cards and modals\n- Increased roundness of cards and modals\n- Fixed gallery button colours\n- Fixed minor footer issues and things with the previous release\n\n# Wiki\n- External links in wikis now have tooltips showing their destination\n\n# API\n- Added the ability to input an API key for future features\n    - Hidden behind a feature flag right now fwiw.\n\n# Setup\n- Expanded width and jankily updated to support new colours\n    - Redesign coming eventually hopefully..\n
